name: Birdie Train Golf Lounge
about: Birdie Train Golf Lounge is a virtual golf simulator venue located inside The Boiler Bar & Grille in Orange, Massachusetts. It utilizes high-end Trackman technology to offer golfers the ability to play on over 200 virtual courses worldwide or work on their swing with detailed analytical data. The venue provides a casual, welcoming atmosphere with a full-service bar and restaurant on-site, making it a convenient all-in-one destination for golf, food, and drinks. It is suitable for individual practice, group events, league play, and tournaments, with flexible hours to accommodate various schedules and a special Sunday deal offering three hours for the price of two.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides detailed swing data for game improvement
Convenient in-house restaurant and bar allows for easy food and drink service during play
Supports various events from leagues and tournaments to corporate parties and casual outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu available through The Boiler Bar & Grille, featuring appetizers, salads, burgers, sandwiches, homemade entrees, and smoked BBQ
Bar service available through The Boiler Bar & Grille

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade simulator used for play, practice, and data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they also have club rentals available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue is located inside The Boiler Bar & Grille which offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes around 2 to 3 hours, depending on your pace and whether you are practicing or playing a full round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for all ages, making it a good option for families to enjoy together.
